response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance segment (00:00-01:30) and the talk segment (01:30-04:59). 2. Used the on-screen text 'Brave Shine' to identify the song. 3. Confirmed Aimer as the original artist via search. 4. Performed a search for 'Brave Shine Aimer lyrics' and found the full lyrics and English translation. 5. Constructed the JSON object with the requested fields.
response.global_summary: The video features a live musical performance of 'Brave Shine' by VTubers Mori Calliope, Raora Panthera, and Tokoyami Towa, followed by a post-performance discussion and sign-off.

scenes.description: VTubers Mori Calliope, Raora Panthera, and Tokoyami Towa perform the song 'Brave Shine' on a stage with laser lighting effects and digital backgrounds.
scenes.performer_in_video: Mori Calliope, Raora Panthera, Tokoyami Towa
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
左手に隠した
願いは願いのままで
覚めない夢見てた

右手には殻の記憶
誰も知らない世界の果て
止まない雨に打たれていた

守りたいものを守れる強さ
それを信じられなくなる弱さ
全て受け入れて
明日を探す

Brave shine
手を伸ばせばまだ
Stay the night
傷だらけの夜
You saved my life
振りかざした刃の先に
想いを重ねた
祈りは時を超えて
Your brave shine

光ること忘れた
青い星が残してく
消えない影見てた

すれ違う赤の軌跡
何も知らない子供のまま
明けない夜を彷徨ってた

失せないものを失くした弱さ
何も信じられなくなる
暗さ立てなくなっても
運命は進む

Break down
崩れ落ちてゆく星座が
傷つけ合う夜
You're breaking dawn
交わした言葉の中に
一人を支えた
確かな夢を添えて

守りたいものを守れるのなら
全てを受け入れて
明日を探す
夜明けを灯す

Brave shine
手を伸ばせばまだ
Stay the night
傷だらけの夜
You save my life
重ねた涙の果てに
光を見つけた
祈りは時を超えて
My brave shine
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hidden in my left hand
Wishes remain as they are
Dreaming of an endless dream

In my right hand, memories of a shell
At the end of a world unknown to anyone
Being struck by the never-ending rain

Strength to protect what I want to protect
Weakness that makes it hard to believe in it
Accepting everything
Searching for tomorrow

Brave shine
If I reach out my hand, there's still
Stay the night
A night full of scars
You saved my life
Layering feelings at the tip of the raised blade
Prayers transcend time
Your brave shine

Forgot to shine
The blue star leaves behind
Watching the unerasable shadow

The passing red trajectory
Like a child who knows nothing
Wandering through the endless night

Weakness of losing what can't be lost
Losing faith in everything
Even if the darkness doesn't stand
Fate moves forward

Break down
The crumbling constellations
Nights where we hurt each other
You're breaking dawn
In the exchanged words
Supporting one another
Accompanied by a certain dream

If I can protect what I want to protect
Accepting everything
Searching for tomorrow
Lighting up the dawn

Brave shine
If I reach out my hand, there's still
Stay the night
A night full of scars
You save my life
Finding light at the end of shed tears
Prayers transcend time
My brave shine

scenes.description: The performers engage in a post-performance discussion and sign-off. No vocal music is playing.
